questions.question_text_full: Which statement best reflects a fact mentioned in the given passage?

options.text: The Sapphire-winged Warbler is the largest bird species in the avian kingdom.
Schools on the island organise annual bird-watching competitions.
The Sapphire-winged Warbler is the only bird species on the tropical island.
Researchers are using satellite tracking devices to study the bird's migratory patterns.

questions.correct_option_text: Researchers are using satellite tracking devices to study the bird's migratory patterns.

questions.question_text_full: Identify the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word ‘stare’ from the passage.
